Author: bonkBANK, Infi, Anna
Name: Chat 2 (BonkChat)
Description:
Chat 2 is a complete rewrite of the in-game chat window as a plugin.
It supports:

- Unlimited tabs
- Tabs that always send to a certain channel
- More flexible filtering
- RGB channel colouring
- Completely variable font size
- Sidebar tabs
- Unread counts
- Emotes
- Screenshot mode (obfuscate names)
Punchline: Chat 2 fork with AI grammar correction to practice your English while you play.
Changelog:
**BonkChat 1.43.0**
- AI API keys are now stored encrypted (Windows DPAPI, per-user);
  existing plain-text keys are encrypted automatically on load
- Background images can be cropped: the crop frame is locked to your
  current chat window size, drag to position and zoom to frame
- Works for both the global image and per-tab images

**BonkChat 1.42.2**
- AI responses are now cached (LRU, 200 entries): repeating the same
  request answers instantly without using API quota
- Cache size and a clear button in the AI settings tab

**BonkChat 1.42.1**
- Per-tab background images (set in Settings -> Tabs; falls back to
  the global image when a tab has none)
- Pop-out tab windows now draw their tab's background image
- Fixed pop-out height being reduced while the AI panel was open

**BonkChat 1.42.0**
- Right click any message -> "AI: Translate to Thai" with slang/vocab notes
- Custom background image for the chat window (Display settings):
  choose any image, adjust opacity, stretch or cover fit

**BonkChat 1.41.1**
- Keybinds for the AI features, configurable in the AI settings tab
- Default: Ctrl+G corrects grammar, Ctrl+T translates to English
- Both work while typing in the chat input

**BonkChat 1.41.0 - AI Learning Update**
- Grammar corrections now open a suggestion panel above the input box
- Changed words are highlighted, with short explanations in Thai
- New translate button: type Thai, get natural English for game chat
- Thai text rendering and Thai typing in the chat input
- Configurable prompts for both modes in the AI settings tab

**1.40.x**
- AI portal supporting ChatGPT (OpenAI), Gemini and SWU AI
- AI grammar correction button next to the chat input
- Based on Chat 2 by Infi & Anna
